metadata.description: Multi-tentacled orchestration plugin for Factory AI Droid

plugins.name: claude-octopus
plugins.description: v9.52.0 - Reliability wave: tangle contextual review correction loop with hard round ceiling, progress-supervised review rounds (per-agent stall watch, descendant-tree kills), council diversity and agy pin fixes, marketplace generator source-of-truth fix, provider troubleshooting runbook and cost-expectations docs. 42 agents, 50 commands, 58 skills. Run /octo:setup.
